Home > AI Assistant > Gamma

Gamma

★★★★☆ ~400 credits (initial grant) Paid from: $10/month (Plus)

Visit official site →

AI-powered presentation generator. Enter a topic and get auto-designed slides with layout, images, and content. Free plan: ~400 credits, no card required.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: ~400 credits (initial grant)
  • Reset: Resets monthly
  • Watermark: Free tier has watermark
  • Commercial: Commercial use allowed (with watermark)

Key Features

  • AI auto-generates presentations
  • Supports documents and web pages
  • Auto layout and image placement
  • Export to PDF
  • Share and embed links
  • Multiple templates and layouts

Pros

  • No credit card needed
  • Fast generation
  • Professional layouts
  • Chinese supported

Cons

  • Free plan has watermark
  • Free credits don't refresh
  • No custom branding on free plan

Tips

  • Try free plan first to test quality
  • Detailed descriptions = better slides
  • Great for quick reports and pitches
